scripts.dev: concurrently --kill-others-on-fail -n "backend,frontend" -c "yellow,blue" "npm run dev --prefix restronet-backend" "npm run dev --prefix restronet-frontend"
scripts.start: concurrently --kill-others-on-fail -n "backend,frontend" -c "yellow,blue" "npm run start --prefix restronet-backend" "npm run dev --prefix restronet-frontend"
scripts.install:all: npm install && npm install --prefix restronet-backend && npm install --prefix restronet-frontend
